zh.lifeSummary: 當Egidia Keith於1424年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾福布斯時，她的父親Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland35歲，母親Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow29歲。她於1439年與James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1473年8月14日在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯福爾卡爾享年49歲，埋葬在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯福爾卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Egidia Keith于1424年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾福布斯时，她的父亲Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland35岁，母亲Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow29岁。她于1439年与James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1473年8月14日在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯福爾卡爾享年49岁，埋葬在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯福爾卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: Egidia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Egidia Keith was born in 1424, in Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, her father, Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, was 35 and her mother, Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, was 29. She married James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes in 1439, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 August 1473, in Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, at the age of 49, and was buried in Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Egidia Keith est née en 1424, à Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes en 1439, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 août 1473, à Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Egidia Keith 1424 in Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland 35 und ihre Mutter Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow 29. Sie hat 1439 in Aberdeenshire, Scotland James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. August 1473 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich und wurde in Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Egidia Keith è nata il nel 1424 nel Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes nel 1439, nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 agosto 1473, nel Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Egidia Keithが1424年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアフォーベズで生まれた時，父Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotlandは35歳，母Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzowは29歳であった。1439年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアでJames Forbes 2nd Lord Forbesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1473年8月14日にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルアルペス-デ-ハウテ-プローベンスフォーカルクイエルで49歳で死去し，フランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルアルペス-デ-ハウテ-プローベンスフォーカルクイエルにて埋葬された。

ko.Saltoun, West Haddington, East Lothian,: 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 업퍼 타운 프 살토우
ko.lifeSummary: Egidia Keith(이)가 1424년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 포베스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1439년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1473년 8월 14일 프랑스 플로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 알페스-데-하테-플로븐스 포캘키어에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 플로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 알페스-데-하테-플로븐스 포캘키어에 묻혔다.

pt.Saltoun, West Haddington, East Lothian,: Upper Town of Saltoun, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Egidia Keith nasceu em 1424, em Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes em 1439, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de agosto de 1473, em Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França.

ru.Saltoun, West Haddington, East Lothian,: уппир тоун оф салтоун, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Egidia Keith родилась в 1424 г. в местности форбесь, абирдиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes в 1439 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 августа 1473 г. в местности форкалкуиир, алпес-де-хауте-провенс, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности форкалкуиир, алпес-де-хауте-провенс, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Egidia Keith nació en 1424, en Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, tenía 29 años. Se casó con James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes en 1439, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de agosto de 1473, en Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia.
